item.title: I'm Just a Bill: CDFI Fund Expansion
item.description:
👀 CDFI Fund Expansion

CDFI Fund expansion 119th Congress: appropriations increase · cooperative-class entity eligibility · Tribal CDFI provisions · technical-assistance grant expansion. Composes with #7 MSA + Federal Charter Credit Unions + Cooperative Finance Trio. 🟡 Provisional. Help Each Other Help Ourselves.
